action.reasoning: Observation: Pi0 outputs are in wrong range - values like [-0.24, 0.62, -0.88] vs training data deltas like [0.016, 0, -1]. The model's raw outputs need proper denormalization. Analysis: Pi0 has normalization stats built into its config (unnorm_key). The pretrained model was trained on LIBERO data with specific normalization. I need to check if the policy has unnormalization built in, and if so, what stats it uses. Also need to check if predict_action_chunk already handles unnormalization. Decision: 1) Inspect Pi0's normalization/unnormalization pipeline, 2) Fix the action bridge with proper denormalization, 3) Submit eval quickly.
